Home › New Patients
Welcome

Start With a Conversation. No Commitment Required.

We know choosing a new doctor is a big decision. That's why we offer a free, no-obligation meet and greet — a chance to see the office, meet Dr. Bigley and Dr. Lieberman, ask every question you have, and decide for yourself if we're the right fit. No paperwork. No credit card. No pressure.

How It Works

Getting Started in 4 Simple Steps

1

Fill Out the Form

Tell us a little about yourself — takes about 2 minutes. That's all we need to get started.

2

We Reach Out Within 24 Hours

A member of our team will contact you to find a convenient time for your visit.

3

Come In and Meet the Team

See the office, meet Dr. Bigley and Dr. Lieberman, and ask everything you want to know.

4

Decide When You're Ready

If it feels right, we'll get you enrolled. If you need more time — no worries at all. Zero pressure.

Important Note

We Don't Accept Insurance — Here's Why That's a Good Thing

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. We don't bill insurance. We don't deal with authorizations, referral forms, or billing departments. That's exactly why your new patient appointment is 2 hours and follow-up visits are 1 hour — instead of 7 minutes.

Your flat monthly membership covers all your primary care needs directly. We recommend pairing it with a high-deductible health plan or health sharing plan for hospital stays, surgeries, and specialist care.

❌

What We Don't Do

  • Bill your insurance
  • Submit claims or prior authorizations
  • Charge copays or deductibles
  • Make you wait 3 weeks for a routine appointment
✅

What We Do

  • Flat monthly membership fee
  • Unlimited visits, no copay
  • Same-day access, always
  • Your doctor, directly, when you need them

Request Your Free Meet & Greet

Fill out the form below and we'll reach out within 24 hours to schedule your visit. No pressure, no commitment, no credit card.

We'll contact you within 24 hours. Your information is never shared or sold.

FAQ

New Patient FAQs

No. Forward Family Medicine does not bill insurance. You don't need an insurance card, an explanation of benefits, or a referral. Just come in.

Your ID, a list of current medications, and any recent labs or specialist notes you'd like us to review. That's it.

Meet and greets are typically 20–30 minutes — enough time to see the office, meet the doctors, and ask everything you want to know.

Absolutely — if it feels right, we'll get you started that day. And if you want more time to think, that's completely fine too. No pressure.

Great — that's exactly who we're built for. Chronic conditions improve dramatically with more time, better monitoring, and a lifestyle medicine approach. We'd love to be part of that journey.

FFM Forward Family Medicine

The Main Line's only Direct Primary Care practice with in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine.

Schedule a Free Meet & Greet

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
